params.SpellDescription: When you cast your next instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: When you cast your next instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, put a time counter on CARDNAME. Then if there are seven or more time counters on it, remove those counters and it deals 20 damage to you.
